summary: Evaluating computes the numerical value of an expression, turning an exact form like √2 or π into a decimal you can read off.
method: Make sure the expression has no remaining unknowns (substitute any variable values first).
Replace exact constants and functions with their numerical values.
Carry out the arithmetic in the right order (powers, then multiply/divide, then add/subtract).
Read off the decimal result; remember angles are in radians here.
